compiled_state.title: Fix ticket-reducer.py CREATE handler to read tags from CREATE event data
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Implementation

In `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py`, the CREATE event handler (around line 362) does not read the `tags` field from `data`. Add `state["tags"] = data.get("tags", [])` after the existing field assignments in the CREATE handler block.

Pattern to follow: the EDIT handler (around line 454) handles tags with isinstance checks because EDIT events can carry CSV strings. For the CREATE handler, `data.get("tags", [])` is sufficient — CREATE event data is structured JSON (list or absent), not a user-typed CSV string.

Files to modify:
- `plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-reducer.py` — CREATE handler block (search for `state["assignee"] = data.get("assignee")`)

## TDD Requirement

RED test already exists: `pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_create_event_with_tags`
Run it before the fix to confirm it fails (RED), then after the fix to confirm it passes (GREEN).
Also confirm `test_create_event_without_tags` remains GREEN (backward compatibility).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py
- [ ] `test_create_event_with_tags` passes after fix (GREEN)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_create_event_with_tags -v
- [ ] `test_create_event_without_tags` remains GREEN (backward compat)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer.py::test_create_event_without_tags -v

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6 ✓ — Fix complete. Added tags field to CREATE handler in ticket-reducer.py. RED test now GREEN.
comments.author: Test
